interface.name: zsingularity_tiling_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface allows a client to manage window geometry for tiling purposes.

request.name: get_geometry
request.description: Requests the current geometry of a toplevel. The compositor replies with a single "geometry" event for that toplevel. Used by session save to capture exact window position/size/output.

event.name: geometry
event.description: Sent in response to get_geometry. output is the connector name (e.g. "DP-2"); maximized/fullscreen are 0/1.

request.name: set_geometry
request.description: Sets the geometry of a toplevel window.

request.name: set_tiled
request.description: Sets the tiled state of a window (removes decorations etc).

request.name: snap_view
request.description: Snaps the view to a screen edge using internal compositor logic.

request.name: move_to_workspace
request.description: Moves a toplevel to the workspace at the given zero-based index, without requiring it to be focused. Used by the overview to drag a window onto another workspace.
